1.4.1.en: Fixed 'N/A' issue for wind direction in Analytics device. Switched to standard system icons for better UI consistency. Removed temporary SVG assets.

1.4.0.en: Added WS90 Analytics Insights device with Beaufort wind scale, wind direction as text, rain rate, pressure trend, solar drying index, frost warning and rain prediction. Fixed rain alarm label to 'Wet'. Enabled Insights graphs for all custom rain capabilities. Code quality improvements.

1.3.0.en: Added meaningful rain capabilities: Is Raining (alarm), Rain today, Rain last hour and Rain last 24h. Removed raw rain accumulation total.

1.2.0.en: Added support for wind gust speed measurement and 'Feels like' temperature calculation.

1.1.0.en: Added rotational debug log system with connection health summary and copy-to-clipboard functionality.
